agent-sdk/audio-pipeline.title: Audio Pipeline
agent-sdk/audio-pipeline.description: The Audio Pipeline manages the flow of audio through your agent, handling speech-to-text (STT) and text-to-speech (TTS) conversion.

agent-sdk/base-agent.title: Base Agent
agent-sdk/base-agent.description: The BaseAgent class is the foundation for all STELLA agents. It handles LiveKit connectivity, audio processing, and message passing.

agent-sdk/building-custom-agent.title: Building Custom Agents
agent-sdk/building-custom-agent.description: This comprehensive guide walks you through building a complete custom agent from scratch.

agent-sdk/getting-started.title: Getting Started
agent-sdk/getting-started.description: This guide walks you through creating your first custom agent using the STELLA Agent SDK.

agent-sdk/message-types.title: Message Types
agent-sdk/message-types.description: STELLA agents communicate via LiveKit's data channel using structured JSON messages. This page documents all message types.

agent-sdk/overview.title: Overview
agent-sdk/overview.description: The STELLA Agent SDK provides the foundation for building custom conversational AI agents that integrate with the STELLA platform.

agent-sdk/progress-tracking.title: Progress Tracking
agent-sdk/progress-tracking.description: STELLA agents can track and display progress through todo lists and progress updates, keeping users informed about ongoing tasks.

agent-sdk/tools.title: Tools
agent-sdk/tools.description: Tools allow agents to execute custom functions during conversations, enabling them to search databases, call APIs, and perform actions beyond simple text generation.

agents/echo-agent.title: echo-agent
agents/echo-agent.description: A simple test agent that echoes back messages for development and debugging.

agents/overview.title: Overview
agents/overview.description: STELLA supports multiple agent types, each designed for different use cases. All agents connect to LiveKit rooms for real-time voice and data communication.

agents/stella-agent.title: stella-agent
agents/stella-agent.description: The full-featured conversational AI agent with advanced capabilities for production deployments.

agents/stella-light-agent.title: stella-light-agent
agents/stella-light-agent.description: A lightweight conversational AI agent optimized for fast responses and lower resource usage.

deployment/kubernetes.title: Kubernetes
deployment/kubernetes.description: This guide explains how to deploy the STELLA system to Kubernetes.

deployment/nginx-setup.title: Nginx Setup
deployment/nginx-setup.description: Guide for configuring Nginx as a reverse proxy for STELLA in production.

deployment/production.title: Production
deployment/production.description: Guide for deploying STELLA in production environments.

deployment/reverse-proxy.title: Reverse Proxy
deployment/reverse-proxy.description: Complete guide for deploying STELLA with a reverse proxy, supporting both path-based and subdomain-based routing.

getting-started/first-agent.title: First Agent
getting-started/first-agent.description: This guide walks you through deploying your first conversational AI agent in STELLA.

getting-started/installation.title: Installation
getting-started/installation.description: Detailed guide for installing STELLA and its prerequisites.

getting-started/quick-start.title: Quick Start
getting-started/quick-start.description: Get the entire STELLA system running in 3 commands.

guides.title: Guides
guides.description: Practical guides for common tasks and advanced configurations.

index.title: Introduction
index.description: System for Testing and Engineering LLM-based Conversational Agents

integration/livekit.title: LiveKit
integration/livekit.description: Guide for integrating LiveKit client in your frontend to connect to STELLA sessions.

integration/livekit-production.title: LiveKit Production
integration/livekit-production.description: Guide for configuring LiveKit for production with WebRTC and TURN support.
